systems.name: opencode Session Runtime
systems.description: Daemon runtime handling per-session prompt assembly, tool dispatch, and LLM calls

systems.name: UI / Frontend
systems.description: TUI, web dashboard; emits session-switch signals and subscribes to capability_layer.refreshed events

systems.name: File System
systems.description: AGENTS.md (global + project), SKILL.md files, enablement.json on disk

systems.name: SkillLayerRegistry
systems.description: In-memory per-session skill state store (existing, minor integration only)

systems.name: RuntimeEventService
systems.description: Append-only workflow/anomaly event log consumed by dashboard + telemetry

containers.name: Rebind Epoch Core
containers.description: New module — per-session rebind epoch map, bumpEpoch API, rate limit guard, event emission

containers.name: Capability Layer Module
containers.description: New module — orchestrates refresh of AGENTS.md / driver / skill content / enablement; epoch-keyed cache

containers.name: Prompt Assembly
containers.description: runLoop that builds system[] per LLM call; consumes CT1 epoch + CT2 cached layers

containers.name: Slash Command System
containers.description: Existing command dispatcher; extended with /reload handler

containers.name: Tool System
containers.description: Existing tool registry; extended with refresh_capability_layer tool

containers.name: Server Routes
containers.description: HTTP / SSE routes; extended with POST /session/:id/resume endpoint

components.name: RebindEpoch.bumpEpoch
components.description: Core API: bump session epoch, enforce rate limit, emit session.rebind event, clear capability-layer cache

components.name: RebindEpoch.current
components.description: Read current epoch for a sessionID (returns 0 if uninitialized)

components.name: RebindEpoch rate-limit guard
components.description: Sliding window counter; reject if > 5 bumps/second/session; emit anomaly on reject

components.name: CapabilityLayer.reinject
components.description: Read AGENTS.md + driver + skill content + enablement, fill cache at current epoch, emit capability_layer.refreshed

components.name: CapabilityLayer.get
components.description: Lookup cache by (sessionID, epoch); cache-miss triggers reinject; returns layer strings

components.name: InstructionPrompt.system (modified)
components.description: AGENTS.md reader; cache changed from 10s TTL to epoch-based invalidation

components.name: MandatorySkills.preload (integrated)
components.description: Existing skill preload, now called from CapabilityLayer.reinject

components.name: SessionPrompt.runLoop (modified)
components.description: Per-LLM round: get current epoch, retrieve cached capability layer, checkpoint apply, dispatch LLM

components.name: Provider-switch detection (modified)
components.description: Pre-loop switch detection; calls bumpEpoch(provider_switch) before compactWithSharedContext

components.name: /reload command handler
components.description: Slash command: bumpEpoch(slash_reload); returns user-facing ack; no LLM call

components.name: refresh_capability_layer tool
components.description: AI-invokable tool: per-turn rate limit (3x), bumpEpoch(tool_call) with reason

components.name: POST /session/:id/resume endpoint
components.description: Server route: validate origin, bumpEpoch(session_resume), trigger silent init round

components.name: Daemon bootstrap bumpEpoch
components.description: On first-use-per-daemon, lazy bump from 0→1 with trigger=daemon_start

components.name: RuntimeEventService.append
components.description: Existing event sink; receives session.rebind / capability_layer.refreshed / storm / fail events

components.name: skill-layer-seam renderer
components.description: Existing: renders SkillLayerRegistry entries into system prompt text blocks

relationships.label: get cached capability layer at epoch
read enablement.json, coding.txt, driver prompt files
emit anomaly if per-turn limit exceeded
